title: Foundations — Web & Systems
desc: Mastered full-stack fundamentals — HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js. Shipped first production-ready web applications and established core engineering discipline.

title: Deep Learning & Computer Vision
desc: Engineered production-grade AI systems: Tomato Leaf Disease Detection (MobileNetV2, 94%+ accuracy) and Real-Time Concentration Tracker using facial landmark AI. Entered the ML research space in earnest.

title: Startup — KabadiVaala (Ongoing)
desc: Contributing as an AI/ML Engineer at KabadiVaala, a sustainability-focused startup revolutionizing the scrap and recycling industry in India. Built intelligent pricing models and data pipelines for real-time waste classification and valuation.

title: Reinforcement Learning & Open Source
desc: Built AlphaForge — an autonomous Forex RL trading system using PPO with a custom-built Gymnasium environment. Actively contributing to open-source ML tooling and computer vision projects on GitHub.
